sub_modules.aes128_sbox: Combinational AES S-box lookup for one byte.
sub_modules.aes128_subbytes: Applies the AES S-box independently to all 16 state bytes.
sub_modules.aes128_shiftrows: Performs AES encryption ShiftRows byte permutation.
sub_modules.aes128_mixcolumns: Performs AES encryption MixColumns over four state columns in GF(2^8).
sub_modules.aes128_key_expand_round: Computes one AES-128 round key from the previous round key and Rcon.
sub_modules.aes128_round: Combinational AES encryption round with optional final-round MixColumns bypass.
